ocr_findings.description: The stacked waterfall chart showing 5つの利益の関係 (売上高100→売上総利益70→営業利益50→経常利益40→税引前当期純利益35→当期純利益25, with 売上原価30/販管費20/営業外損益10/特別損益5/法人税等10 as deductions) is OCR'd as a flat markdown table with severely garbled structure: '当期純利益 25' appears twice in different columns, '特別損益 5' is placed in the wrong row position, and column groupings do not match the visual hierarchy. The cascading profit relationships are not recoverable from the OCR table.
Page number '45' appears at top of OCR output (line 3) before the section header — minor ordering artifact, cosmetic only.

reviewer_notes: The 5-profit waterfall diagram is the central content of this page and its table rendering in OCR is materially incorrect — the cascading relationships between profit levels are scrambled. Body text for キャッシュフロー計算書 and 黒字倒産 sections below the chart is faithfully transcribed. Overall verdict FAIL due to the high-severity table_format issue.
